summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PLYAZ Next.js 15 league management platform. All major frontend functionality working excellently including landing page, navigation, login/signup, public league pages, dark mode toggle, and UI components. Previously reported EXPLORE DATA button issue has been fixed. Only remaining issue is backend API health endpoint returning 404.

api_issues.issue: Returns 404 Not Found instead of JSON response

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero section and gradient 'ELITE TALENT' text
Animated counters (24k+, 1200+, 99.9%) working perfectly with smooth animations
CREATE YOUR LEAGUE button (hero) navigates correctly to /login?mode=signup
Nav CREATE LEAGUE link navigates correctly to /login?mode=signup
Nav SIGN IN link navigates correctly to /login
Login page renders with proper split layout - left branding panel + right form
Login page shows email/password fields and SIGN IN button correctly
Switch to signup mode works - shows fullname and confirm password fields
Public league page at /league/public loads with competition cards (Premier Division, Sunday Cup)
Public league page sidebar correctly shows 'Admin Login' instead of 'Sign Out'
Dark mode toggle works perfectly - switches theme and applies dark classes
Public matches page at /league/public/matches loads properly
Public teams page at /league/public/teams loads with team cards and statistics
EXPLORE DATA button now works correctly (previously reported issue fixed)
Mobile responsiveness and UI components render properly
Theme persistence works across page navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix API health endpoint configuration - /api/health should return JSON response with 200 status instead of 404. The FastAPI proxy routing may need adjustment. Overall app functionality is excellent with 93% success rate.
success_percentage: Frontend UI: 100%, Navigation: 100%, Public Pages: 100%, Login/Auth UI: 100%, Dark Mode: 100%, API Health: 0%
